教科書/Required texts0: Note: To ensure you benefit most from the class, DO NOT USE second-hand textbooks that contain another person's answers to activities. You MUST have a new book to complete listening, fill-in-the-blank, and other written activities yourself.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: semester test (20%), speaking tests (20%), final group presentation (25%), continuous assessment (25%), on-demand assignments (10%)
備考Note0: NOTE: A more detailed syllabus will be given on the first day of class. There may be some changes regarding the class schedule and grading criteria. Make sure to read and follow the course syllabus and weekly schedule, and any other information given in your class.
